title: Services many expats arrange during the first months
intro: These are often the practical services people organize as they settle into daily life.

items.reason: Useful for salary and recurring payment setup in early months.
Helpful for transfers while your financial setup stabilizes.
Compare insurance options as your month-one choices become clearer.
Reliable mobile setup supports account and admin verification.
Useful if your first housing setup is temporary or evolving.
